title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at JSW Steel

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at JSW Steel
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, JSW Steel in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About JSW Steel:
JSW Steel is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JSW Steel!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
